name: Alliance of Genome Resources
description: A consortium of 7 model organism databases (MODs) and the Gene Ontology (GO) Consortium whose goal is to provide an integrated view of their data to all biologists, clinicians and other interested parties.
citation: Updates to the Alliance of Genome Resources central infrastructure. 2024. Alliance of Genome Resources Consortium. Genetics. 2024 May 7;227(1):iyae049. doi: 10.1093/genetics/iyae049. PMID: 38552170.

isBasedOn.name: FlyBase
isBasedOn.description: FlyBase is a database of Drosophila genes and genomes, providing integrated genetic, genomic, and functional data for the model organism Drosophila melanogaster.

isBasedOn.name: Mouse Genome Informatics
isBasedOn.description: MGI is the international database resource for the laboratory mouse, providing integrated genetic, genomic, and biological data to facilitate the study of human health and disease.

isBasedOn.name: Rat Genome Database
isBasedOn.description: RGD is the premier resource for rat genetic and genomic data, facilitating research using the rat as a model for human disease.

isBasedOn.name: Saccharomyces Genome Database
isBasedOn.description: SGD provides comprehensive integrated biological information for the budding yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae, a widely used model organism for eukaryotic biology.

isBasedOn.name: Zebrafish Information Network
isBasedOn.description: ZFIN serves as the central repository for genetic, genomic, phenotypic, and developmental data for zebrafish (Danio rerio), a model organism for vertebrate development and human disease.
